EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IAffineTransformation3D

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that define and manipulate affine transformations in 3D.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("C3E86164-2F35-4068-8706-0A07614F6AC3")]
public interface IAffineTransformation3D : ITransformation

Methods

DefineFromControlPoints(int, ref IPoint, ref IPoint)

Defines the best 3D affine transformation between two sets of points. Can be used to register paper maps on a digitizer.

void DefineFromControlPoints(int numPoints, ref IPoint fromPoints, ref IPoint toPoints)

Parameters

numPoints int
fromPoints IPoint
toPoints IPoint

Examples

Sample Snippet

DefineFromControlPointsEx(int, ref WKSPointZ, ref WKSPointZ) 

void DefineFromControlPointsEx(int numPoints, ref WKSPointZ fromPoints, ref WKSPointZ toPoints)

Parameters

numPoints int
fromPoints WKSPointZ
toPoints WKSPointZ

GetControlPointError(int, out double, out double)

Returns the errors involved in moving control point i from the 'from' to 'to' system. These error terms are valid after using DefineFromControlPoints/Ex to define the transformation.

void GetControlPointError(int i, out double fromError, out double toError)

Parameters

i int
fromError double
toError double

Examples

Sample Snippet

GetRMSError(out double, out double)

RMS (Root Mean Square) error expressed relative to the 'from' and 'to' points defining the transformation. These error terms are valid after using DefineFromControlPoints/Ex to define the transformation.

void GetRMSError(out double fromError, out double toError)

Parameters

fromError double
toError double

Examples
